WS7-T3.title: Reveal experience

WS7-T7.title: Duo UI

WS7-T9.title: Settings UI
WS7-T9.note: Merged main d7ccd6f (squash of PR #38, branch feat/ws7-t9-settings-ui). Settings UI: pause-nemesis toggle, 4 email + 3 push notification toggles, typed-handle delete confirm, claim-gated via inline ClaimEntry. Fable review (F1-F6) fixes applied; INV-10 flaky test fixed via vi.useFakeTimers in question-state-view.test.tsx. Rebased onto main once for a copy.ts additive conflict (threadCopy vs settingsCopy).

WS8-T2.title: Share cards + share sheet
WS8-T2.note: Recovered a prior interrupted agent's checkpointed WIP, verified against the 3 ACs (loss+busted-streak render, QR decodes to canonical URL, share_completed fires end-to-end), fixed a merge-induced share-button wiring gap in RevealSequence (WS7-T3 moved revealed-state rendering out of ViewerStrip after this branch diverged), added QR decode-proof tests. Full build/lint/test/integration/e2e green.

WS8-T4.title: oEmbed + meta + sitemap
WS8-T4.note: PR #48 open: GET /api/oembed (same-host pattern-match, SSRF-hardened, never fetches url=) + /sitemap.xml (revealed questions + visible profiles). Unit/integration/e2e all green.

WS8-T5.title: SEO archive pass
WS8-T5.note: Merged main 45d0141 (squash of PR #67). /q archive (force-dynamic, mirrors sitemap.ts's DATABASE_URL-at-build-time precedent), Article/ItemList JSON-LD, canonical tag added to /q/[slug], robots.txt with explicit og/oembed allow. Fable review fixes applied (robots.txt allow-list, removed dead truncated field). pct_yes rounding inconsistency in serialize-question.ts flagged as a pre-existing, out-of-scope follow-up.
